channel.title: Study Abroad on Rambling Rover
channel.description: Recent content in Study Abroad on Rambling Rover

item.title: "Chrismtas" Photo Shoot
item.description:
All I have to say is dang. I love these people.

(also we got three more people to dye their hair for the photo shoot @Jack, @Claire, @George) Which ups the tally of people within out group that have dyed our hair to 7: Flo, Kate, Me, Claire D, Claire W, Jack, George

Okay, back to the photo shoot.

The Set Up

Michaela created the event on Facebook–great spelling and all–and included some great photo shop work
